title: cymbidium × purpuratum
intro: Cymbidium × purpuratum, also known as the Purpurellum orchid, is a hybrid orchid species that is a cross between the Cymbidium purpuratum and Cymbidium erythrostylum. The Purpurellum orchid has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Cymbidium × purpuratum include relieving respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis, reducing fever and body aches, and promoting wound healing. In traditional herbal preparations, Cymbidium × purpuratum is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed for their medicinal benefits.
